_note: Grandma-class utterances for the GUI shell tool surface. expectTool is a string or an array of acceptable tools (first entry is primary; expectArgs only checked when the primary is chosen). Substrings in expectArgs must appear in the JSON-encoded arguments (case-insensitive). 'none' means the correct behavior is answering in text without any tool call.

fixtures.utterance: open google chrome
I don't know how to bring up the googles
can you open the calculator for me
I want to write a note, open something for that
would you please start up Steam
where are my vacation photos
find that tax letter from last year
I saved a recipe for chocolate cake somewhere, find it
look for my resume
which file mentions the plumber's phone number
what's in my downloads folder
show me the files in this folder
remember that my granddaughter's birthday is June 3rd
remember I like the text big
when did I say my granddaughter's birthday was?
open the thing
good morning!
thank you, you're very helpful
opne crome
ugh I can never find anything... find my insurance card scan
